title: btw plan rework fixes: reconcile the wave scaffold before approval, unify spec-dir flags, purge the absorbed wave-scaffold command, surface the plan JSON schema

waves.summary: Harness engine: reconcile-vs-freeze scaffold writes, spec-dir flag aliases plus normalisation, schema-teaching plan errors, and the resume-gate token rename.
Instruction surfaces: stop telling readers to run the absorbed command, and lock that with a guard test derived from the published CLI surface.
